name: claude-operators
description: A plugin marketplace for Claude Code operator subagents. Each operator wraps a CLI tool behind a dedicated subagent with enforcement hooks that block direct CLI usage.
author: htxryan

plugins.name: operator-system
plugins.description: Base infrastructure for operator subagents. Provides CLI enforcement hooks, subagent lifecycle tracking, the git-operator agent, and a scaffolding skill for creating new operators.

plugins.name: github-operator
plugins.description: GitHub operator subagent. Guards the gh CLI and provides expert GitHub operations (PRs, issues, Actions, releases).

plugins.name: bun-operator
plugins.description: Bun runtime and package manager operator subagent. Guards bun and bunx CLI commands.

plugins.name: cloudflare-wrangler-operator
plugins.description: Cloudflare Workers operator subagent. Guards the wrangler CLI for deployments, secrets, KV, R2, Queues, and more.

plugins.name: drizzle-operator
plugins.description: Drizzle ORM operator subagent. Guards the drizzle-kit CLI for migrations, schema push/pull, and Drizzle Studio.

plugins.name: neon-operator
plugins.description: Neon Postgres operator subagent. Guards the neonctl CLI for branch management, connection strings, and database operations.
